description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image and runs a global before_script to update apt-get quietly and install sqlite3, wget, and curl. Include the official Code-Quality.gitlab-ci.yml template. Add a test1 job in the default test stage that executes `python hello.py`, and a test2 job also in the test stage that runs the same command. Both jobs inherit the before_script and the shared image.
